## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I reused existing helpers/utilities where possible.
- [ ] I did not include unrelated refactors or formatting-only changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when applicable.
- [ ] I validated user-facing text for localization impact.
